title: Medical Requirements - Canada.ca
content:
## Medical Requirements
This section contains policy, procedures and guidance used by IRCC staff. It is posted on the department’s website as a courtesy to stakeholders.
The requirement for a medical examination serves several purposes:
- to protect the health of Canadians;
- to protect the safety of Canadians;
- to reduce and prevent excessive demand on Canada's health and social services.
- Immigration medical examination
- Assessing medical requirements
- Medical surveillance and notifications
- Medical refusals and inadmissibility
- Panel physicians program
- Forms, handouts and templates
